senses.definition: our mother or our father

examples.x: Becoming a parent is a life-changing experience that comes with great responsibility.
My parent, a loving and supportive figure, always encouraged me to pursue my dreams.
The parents attended the school meeting to discuss their child's progress.
The parents took turns reading bedtime stories to their children every night.

senses.definition: a child's male parent

examples.x: As a father, he takes great joy in spending quality time with his children and creating lasting memories.
Fathers play a crucial role in their children's upbringing and development.
John's father is an engineer, and he passed down his passion for technology to his son.
My father is my role model and has always been there for me.
The father proudly walked his daughter down the aisle on her wedding day.

senses.definition: a child's female parent

examples.x: Mothers play a vital role in nurturing and shaping their children's lives.
My mother is the most caring and loving person I know.
Sarah's mother is a doctor, and she has always been a source of inspiration for her.
She inherited her artistic talent from her mother, who is an accomplished painter.
The mother gently cradled her newborn baby in her arms.

senses.definition: an informal way of calling our father

examples.x: My dad is a great cook and makes the best pancakes on weekends.
Sarah's dad taught her how to ride a bike and it became a cherished childhood memory.
When I was a child, my dad used to tell me bedtime stories every night.

senses.definition: a woman who has given birth to a child or someone who cares for and raises a child

examples.x: Mom, can you help me with my homework?
Mom, thank you for always supporting me and encouraging me to pursue my passions.
My mom is an amazing cook.
Sarah's mom is a strong and loving woman who has raised her children with unconditional love and guidance.
When I was sick, my mom took care of me and made sure I had everything I needed to feel better.

senses.definition: the lady you are officially married to

examples.x: As a devoted wife, she takes care of the household chores and ensures a comfortable home for her family.
John introduced his wife to his colleagues at the company dinner party.
My wife is a talented artist and her paintings always leave me in awe.
She is a loving wife who supports her husband's dreams and ambitions.
Tom and his wife have been happily married for over 20 years, and they still have a strong bond.

senses.definition: the man you are officially married to

examples.x: As a loving husband, he surprises his wife with romantic gestures on special occasions.
He is a responsible husband who shares the household chores and takes care of their children.
My husband is a hardworking and supportive partner who always puts family first.
Sarah and her husband have been happily married for ten years and have built a strong foundation of love and trust.
She introduced her husband as a successful entrepreneur during the charity event.

senses.definition: a son or daughter of any age

examples.x: She read a bedtime story to her child every night before tucking them into bed.
The family gathered for a special dinner to celebrate the birthday of their eldest child.
The proud father watched his child perform on stage, beaming with joy.
Even as an adult, she remains a devoted child, always seeking her parents' advice.
In many cultures, the bond between parents and children is considered one of the strongest connections.

senses.definition: a person's male child

examples.x: John is a loving father who takes great pride in raising his two sons.
Lisa beamed with pride as she watched her son receive his diploma on graduation day.
My son is a talented musician and plays the guitar beautifully.
Sarah and David are expecting their first child, and they are hoping for a son.
The father and son spent a delightful afternoon playing catch in the park.

senses.definition: a person's female child

examples.x: Emily couldn't wait to meet her newborn daughter and hold her in her arms for the first time.
Julia's daughter surprised her with a heartfelt handmade card on Mother's Day.
Mr. and Mrs. Johnson are proud parents of three daughters, each with their unique talents.
Sarah's daughter is an accomplished ballet dancer and has won several awards.
The mother and daughter enjoyed a delightful afternoon of shopping and bonding.

senses.definition: a lady who shares a mother and father with us

examples.x: My dad has two sisters, both of whom are older than him.
She and her sister look very similar, but they have very different personalities.
They are very close sisters and do everything together.
We used to argue a lot when we were younger, but my sister and I get along much better now.
You should talk to your sister and see if she can help you with your problem.

senses.definition: a man who shares a mother and father with us

examples.x: Emily's brother likes to play video games and watch sports on TV.
He is always protective of her younger brother and looks out for him.
My brother is my best friend and we tell each other everything.
My brother is younger than me and always makes me laugh.
She doesn't have any brothers, but she has a close friend who's like a brother to her.

senses.definition: people that are related to each other by blood or marriage, normally made up of a father, mother, and their children

examples.x: Family is important to me because they support me when I need it.
I have a big family with lots of cousins and aunts and uncles.
My family likes to go on vacation together every year.
My sister is my best friend and we do everything together as a family.
When I was a child, my family used to go camping in the mountains.

senses.definition: the woman who is our mom or dad's mother

examples.x: Grandmothers love spending time with their grandchildren and spoil them with candy.
It's important to show respect to your grandmother.
My grandmother used to tell me stories about when she was a young girl.
They visit their grandmother every weekend.
You should call your grandmother and wish her a happy birthday.

senses.definition: the man who is our mom or dad's father

examples.x: He enjoys spending time with his grandfather, playing chess and telling jokes.
My grandfather fought in the war and has many interesting stories to tell.
She and her grandfather like to watch old movies and eat popcorn.
When I was a child, my grandfather died and it was a very sad time for our family.
You should ask your grandfather for advice on how to fix your bike.

senses.definition: your daughter or son's child

examples.x: He takes his grandchild to the zoo and teaches them about different animals.
Her grandchild lives in another country, but they video chat every week to stay in touch.
Her grandchild loves to play with dolls.
My grandparents love spending time with their grandchildren, taking them to the park and playing games.
They are so proud of their grandchild for graduating from college.

senses.definition: the sister of our mother or father or their sibling's wife

examples.x: Anne's aunt always sends her birthday cards and gifts.
My aunt is a really kind sister to my father.
My aunt is my mother's sister and we often spend holidays together.
They went to their aunt's house for Thanksgiving.
We love when our aunt comes to visit because she's always full of fun ideas.

senses.definition: the brother of our father or mother or their sibling's husband

examples.x: His uncle is like a second father to him.
I don't have any uncles, but I have a neighbor who's like an uncle to me.
They often go to their uncle's house for family dinners.
We have a big family with many uncles and aunts.
You should ask your uncle to share stories about your family's history and traditions.

senses.definition: our sister or brother's daughter, or the daughter of our husband or wife's siblings

examples.x: He loves spending time with his niece, teaching her how to play guitar.
Her niece is the only granddaughter in the family and is treated like a princess.
Her niece is the youngest member of the family and everyone loves her.
My niece is like a little sister to me, and I try to be a positive influence in her life.
She and her niece enjoy gardening and planting flowers in the backyard.

senses.definition: our sister or brother's son, or the son of our husband or wife's siblings

examples.x: I bought a toy for my nephew's birthday.
My nephew is coming to visit us this weekend.
My sister's son is my beloved nephew.
She loves spending time with her adorable nephews.
The proud uncle held his newborn nephew in his arms.

senses.definition: our aunt or uncle's child

examples.x: Her cousin is like a brother to her, and they share many interests and hobbies.
Her cousins are like siblings to her.
It's important to be supportive of your cousin, especially during difficult times.
They are planning a family reunion and can't wait to catch up with all their cousins.
We always have a big family barbecue in the summer, and all our cousins bring their favorite dishes to share.
